name: Puthoff and Davis Contribute Technical Research to AAWSAP
summary: During the Defense Intelligence Agency-funded AAWSAP period, Hal Puthoff and Eric Davis contributed technical research on advanced aerospace concepts relevant to the government’s investigation of anomalous phenomena. Their work connected private scientific research with a formal U.S. defense program examining UAP-related questions.

relationships.context: Contributed advanced propulsion and spacetime-metric research
Contributed technical studies on advanced aerospace concepts
Technical investigation of advanced aerospace and anomalous phenomena
